title: CUB Banking Reimagined
subtitle: Innovating India's Mobile Banking Experience for Zero-to-One Growth
problem_statement: CUB's current mobile banking UI is functional but lacks distinctive features for engaging modern Indian users.

pillars.title: Financial Security
pillars.insight: Users need assurance their money is safe and transactions are secure.

pillars.title: Ease of Access
pillars.insight: Quick access to funds, transfers, and account details is paramount.

pillars.title: Time Efficiency
pillars.insight: Users want to complete banking tasks quickly and without friction.

artifacts.label: Strategy
artifacts.title: Defining the Challenges
questions: How might we personalize CUB's banking experience?
How might users manage finances proactively?
How might we gamify daily banking interactions?

solution.name: CUB NextGen
solution.desc: High trust, innovative, personalized financial management.

personas.name: Rohan Sharma
personas.quote: I need smart tools to manage my money.
personas.bio: Tech-savvy professional seeking efficient digital solutions for daily banking and investments.

personas.name: Priya Singh
personas.quote: Budgeting is hard, I need help.
personas.bio: Aspiring professional looking for intuitive tools to track expenses and save for goals.

insights: Am I saving enough for future?

points.action: Replace generic "Daily Expense" with AI-driven spending categories.
points.benefit: Provides actionable insights, improves financial literacy.

points.action: Integrate "Instant Fund Transfer" with contextual payment suggestions.
points.benefit: Speeds up transactions, reduces user effort.

points.action: Adapt gamification elements from fintech apps to encourage savings.
points.benefit: Increases engagement, promotes healthy financial habits.

points.action: Modify "At your Fingertips" to offer personalized financial nudges.
points.benefit: Offers proactive advice, enhances user value.

pivot.before: Generic banking app with standard features and limited financial insights.
pivot.pivot_logic: Shift from transactional banking to proactive financial guidance and personalized engagement.
pivot.after: Intelligent financial companion offering tailored advice and seamless transactions.

stages.actions: Taps banner, navigates to bill pay

stages.friction: Icons are generic, no preview of depth.

annotations.title: Smart Insights
annotations.rationale: Replaces "Daily Expense" with actionable spending analysis.

annotations.title: Contextual Pay
annotations.rationale: Suggests frequent payees based on location/time.

annotations.title: Goal Tracker
annotations.rationale: Visualizes savings progress towards user-defined goals.

data.finding: "Daily Expense" lacks detail, unclear what it represents.
"A+" icon's purpose is unclear, inconsistent with banking norms.
Input field for amount is clear, "Pay" button disabled until input.
Limited customization options for dashboard or quick actions.
